source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Street in Juneau, 1897
description: 1897 photograph of a street scene in Juneau, Alaska during the early years of the Klondike Gold Rush, showing wooden storefronts, muddy unpaved streets, and the early character of the future state capital.
alt: 1897 sepia photograph of a muddy wooden-storefront street in early Juneau, Alaska
